title: tanacetum densum subsp. densum
intro: Tanacetum densum subsp. densum, also known as alpine tansy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include relief from symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Alpine tansy can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine and natural health practices.
